title: juncus arcticus subsp. arcticus
intro: Juncus arcticus subsp. arcticus, also known as Arctic rush, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Juncaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Juncus arcticus subsp. arcticus include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
